listings.name: TA Smiths Grove
listings.description: TravelCenters of America (TA #468) travel center at I-65 Exit 38 in Smiths Grove. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, convenience store, Chester's Chicken and a full-service restaurant, showers, laundry, certified CAT Scale, and 100+ truck parking spaces. Formerly branded Smiths Grove Travel Center (Exxon/BP); now operating as TA.
listings.corroboration: Official TA locator page exists but returns 403 to the agent proxy (bot protection); identity/address/exit/amenities corroborated across TruckerGuide (TA #468), TruckStopsAndServices, and 4RoadService. NOTE: An older Yelp entry 'Smiths Grove Travel Center Exxon' shows CLOSED (Mar 2026) — that is the superseded prior brand; the site now operates as TA (Yelp 'TA Smiths Grove' shows open 24h, reviews through Dec 2024) at the same 605 S Main St address.

listings.name: CAT Scale - TA Smiths Grove
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Smiths Grove travel center, I-65 Exit 38.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale locator (catscale.com) returns 403 to the agent proxy; CAT Scale presence at 605 S Main St corroborated by ChamberOfCommerce, 4RoadService, and the travel-center directory listing. Listed as separate co-located service per the co-location model; host truck stop is the TA row above.

listings.name: Park City Shell (IGA Express)
listings.description: Independent Shell/IGA Express truck stop at I-65 Exit 48 in Park City (Mammoth Cave area). Open 24 hours with gas and diesel, Subway, deli/restaurant, travel store, ATM, propane, and about 15 truck parking spaces.
listings.corroboration: Open/operating status confirmed via Shell official locator and Yelp (IGA Express Shell, updated Dec 2025 = active). Truck-stop amenities and ~15 truck spaces corroborated by TruckerPath, TruckStopsAndServices, and AllStays. Phone left blank (not independently confirmed).

listings.name: Higdon's Service Center
listings.description: Service center / Chevron at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City offering flatbed and wrecker towing, flat/tire repair, engine and lube service, and off-road (dyed) diesel. Associated Higdon's Wrecker Service provides 24/7 towing.
listings.corroboration: Active status confirmed by Yelp (Higdon's Wrecker Service updated Jun 2026; Higdon's Service Center/Chevron updated Feb 2026). Address, phone, and services (towing, flat tire repair, off-road diesel) corroborated by FindFuelStops (I-65 Exit 53 listing) and Yelp. No official website confirmed; left blank.

listings.name: Crossroads Towing & Truck Repair
listings.description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing and truck repair at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City serving Horse Cave, Glasgow, Munfordville and the surrounding area. Services include HD towing/recovery, mobile mechanic, HD tire changes, load shifts/transfers, and equipment hauling.
listings.corroboration: Active status confirmed by Yelp (updated Jan 2026) and official site ctstowing.com. Address 128 W Estes Rd / Exit 53 and phone corroborated by official site and 4RoadService. NOTE: a TruckStopsAndServices entry mislabels this as 'I-65 Exit 2' — the official site and Yelp confirm Cave City Exit 53; the Exit 2 value was treated as a directory error and not used.

listings.name: Red Roof Inn & Suites Cave City
listings.description: Budget hotel at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City (Mammoth Cave area) with free semi-truck and bus parking, 24-hour front desk, and free parking. Reviewers specifically note ample 18-wheeler parking.
listings.corroboration: Identity/address confirmed by Red Roof official property page (rri825) and multiple booking sites. Semi-truck parking corroborated by Tripadvisor parking feature and Yelp reviews explicitly citing '18 wheelers... lots of truck' parking. Truck space count not published, left blank.

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #360
listings.description: Love's Travel Stop #360 at I-65 Exit 58 in Horse Cave. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, DEF lanes, McDonald's and Subway, private showers, laundry, certified CAT Scale, dog park, RV hookups/dump station, propane, and truck parking. Co-located Love's Truck Care tire/service center.
listings.corroboration: Official Love's page returns 403 to the agent proxy; identity/address (4000 L&N Turnpike), Exit 58, phone, CAT Scale, McDonald's/Subway, and amenities corroborated across TruckStopsAndServices, FindFuelStops, and FindTruckService. Truck space count left blank because sources conflict (reported 90 / 161 / 280).

listings.name: CAT Scale #1174 - Love's #360 Horse Cave
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale #1174 at the Love's Travel Stop #360, I-65 Exit 58 in Horse Cave.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale locator returns 403 to the agent proxy; CAT Scale #1174 at Love's #360 corroborated by TruckerGuide (scale #1174), FindFuelStops, and 4RoadService. Separate co-located service row per the co-location model; host truck stop is the Love's #360 row above.

listings.name: Love's Truck Care #360
listings.description: Love's Truck Care center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #360, I-65 Exit 58 in Horse Cave. Full-service truck care: commercial tire sales and repair (Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retread; Lionshead tires), light mechanical service, oil changes, Interstate Batteries, and emergency roadside assistance.
listings.corroboration: Love's Truck Care at #360 corroborated by TruckDown, FindTruckService (Love's Truck/Tire Care #360), and Yelp. Separate co-located service row per the co-location model (distinct from the host Love's truck stop). Phone set to the location's main number.

listings.name: Munfordville Truck Parking (Truck Parking Club)
listings.description: Bookable truck & trailer parking off I-65 Exit 65 in Munfordville, on the CTS/CB-shop lot on Main St. 24/7 access; approximately 6 spaces bookable daily/weekly/monthly via Truck Parking Club. On-site CB shop; dining and Walgreens nearby.
listings.corroboration: Bookable lot listed on Truck Parking Club (active, Exit 65, ~6 spaces, $10/day). Address/location corroborated by CTS Towing Yelp (1786 Main St, updated Apr 2026 = active). Phone left blank (booking is through Truck Parking Club).

listings.name: Hart County Rest Area (I-65 Northbound)
listings.description: KYTC rest area on I-65 Northbound near mile marker 59 (Hart County, between Horse Cave and Munfordville). Separate truck and passenger parking (100+ well-lit spaces), restrooms, picnic area, vending. Repeat winner of Kentucky's Best Maintained Rest Area award.
listings.hold_reason: Existence, direction (northbound), mile marker (~59) and separate truck parking are confirmed via KYTC and news/directory sources, but LEGAL overnight-parking status is not independently confirmed (never assumed from truck-space presence). No street address (mile-marker facility).
listings.corroboration: Direction (NB, MM ~59, Hart County) and separate truck parking corroborated by WCLU Radio (2024 KYTC award), RestAreasNearMe, and the KYTC Welcome Centers/Rest Areas/Weigh Stations document. Held for unconfirmed legal overnight status.

listings.name: Munfordville Rest Area (I-65 Southbound)
listings.description: KYTC rest area on I-65 Southbound near mile marker 60 (Hart County, between Munfordville and Horse Cave). Separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, picnic area, vending.
listings.hold_reason: Existence, direction (southbound), mile marker (~60) and separate truck parking are confirmed via KYTC/directory sources, but LEGAL overnight-parking status is not independently confirmed. No street address (mile-marker facility).
listings.corroboration: Direction (SB, MM ~60) and truck parking corroborated by ParkAdvisor, RestAreasNearMe, and the KYTC facilities document. Held for unconfirmed legal overnight status.

listings.name: Baymont by Wyndham Cave City
listings.description: Baymont by Wyndham hotel at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City advertising free RV/bus/truck (large-vehicle) parking.
listings.hold_reason: Brand page lists free RV/bus/truck parking, but exact street address/zip could not be independently confirmed and some guest reviews cite limited parking; semi/overnight truck capacity not clearly confirmed. Held pending address and truck-parking confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Only the Wyndham brand overview reliably describes truck parking; address not independently confirmed. Insufficient corroboration to publish.

excluded.name: Buc-ee's Smiths Grove
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 38 but expressly bans 18-wheelers/commercial trucks (posted 'no 18-wheelers'; lots not designed for trucks, no truck parking or truck fuel lanes). Not a truck-serving facility per Buc-ee's general counsel and multiple sources.

excluded.name: Cracker Barrel Cave City
excluded.reason: Restaurant at I-65 Exit 53 that allows some overnight/RV parking, but it is not a freight-service facility and does not fit any target category (not a truck stop, hotel, or truck service).
